Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Marlene Westbrook To Perpetuate Testimony Of Paul Westbrook By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kimberly Chu, Esq., for Petitioner and moving party: Marlene Westbrook
Michelle J. Hirth., for potential defendant: MRC Holdings, Inc.

After hearing, Petition of Marlene Westbrook to perpetuate testimony of Paul Westbrook by videotaped deposition is granted. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
